langSet: ✅ Language has been set to **English**! You can now use commands (e.g., `!help`).
helpDesc:
+ You can buy regular licenses by using command **!buy**.
+ You can buy perma license by using command **!buyperma**.

If you don't have **enough balance** to buy **licenses**, follow those steps:
1. Use command **!setuser** to set your in-game name.
2. Use command **!checkuser** to verify your in-game name.
3. Use command **!world** to view current depo world.
(**WARNING:** Don't forget to check if world has **admin/owner**!)
4. After you are done, **deposit the currency** on the **donation box**.
5. You will automatically receive **your balance**.
6. You can view **current download link** with command **!link**.

If there is **any problems**, please open ticket from **#support**

You can use **!balance** command to view your balance.
setUserSuccess: ✅ Your in-game name has been successfully set to: **{name}**
checkUserNoName: ⚠️ You haven't set your in-game name yet! Please use the `!setuser <Name>` command.
